examples: It was his custom to approach every problem cautiously.
David moved cautiously forward and looked over the edge.
She climbed the staircase cautiously, holding fast to the rail.
We eased into our new lives cautiously, subletting furnished apartments on Airbnb.com, Homeaway.com and Craigslist.
Ford's director of sales analysis, George Pipas, acknowledged the concern, but said Ford is proceeding cautiously.
